AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO. AS TO DEFENDANT AL-TAYEB, RAHIM A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AL-TAYEB, RAHIM A. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,594.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

DEFT'S MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT IS ORDERED FULLY SATISFIED.
